sections.paragraph:
Ματθάν, ὁ indecl. (מַתָּן; the name is found 2 Ch 23:17; Jer 45:1—mss. also Μαθθαν; s. Μαθθαῖος) Matthan, in the genealogy of Jesus Mt 1:15; Lk 3:23ff D (Μαθθαν).

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

D D = Didache, except that in a list of manuscripts or as textual variant D refers to Codex Bezae—List 1

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 621
